title: Holy Spirit Church, Margao
tagline: Holy Spirit Church, Margao — spiritual town of Goa

overview.short: Holy Spirit Church, also referred to as the Espirito Santo Church, is a church located in Margao, Goa.
overview.description: Holy Spirit Church, also referred to as the Espirito Santo Church, is a church located in Margao, Goa. Built between 1564 and 1565, it was the second church to be constructed in the Salcete region.

topPlaces.name: Ravindra Bhavan, Margao
topPlaces.description: The Ravindra Bhavan, Margao (RBM) is a cultural center situated in Fatorda, Goa, India. It is administered by the Directorate of Art and Culture, which is part of the Government of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Gomant Vidya Niketan
topPlaces.description: The Gomant Vidya Niketan (GVN) is a private cultural center based in Comba, Goa, India. Established in 1912, it was originally founded as the Saraswat Brahman Samaj, a small library.

topPlaces.name: Comba, Goa
topPlaces.description: Comba (Komb) is a town and suburb of the city of Margao in South Goa district in the state of Goa, India close to the city of Margao. Comba is famous for Margao's well-known temple-hall "Dambaab Saal".It has Damodar Temple along with Ram temple.

topPlaces.name: Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium (Margao)
topPlaces.description: Fatorda Stadium, officially known as Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium, is a multi-purpose stadium in Margao, Goa, India. The venue has been used to host both football and cricket matches.

topPlaces.name: Margao
topPlaces.description: Margao (Goan Konkani: Modgaum, IPA: [mɵɖɡãʋ]; Portuguese: Margão, IPA: [mɐɾɡɐ̃ũ]) is the commercial capital of the Indian state of Goa. It stands on the banks of the river Sal.

topPlaces.name: Gogol, Goa
topPlaces.description: Gogol is a town and suburb of the city of Margao in South Goa district in the state of Goa, India. Gogol is a well connected suburb with good infrastructure such as schools, colleges, post office, banks, public transport, shopping areas close to Margao city.

topPlaces.name: Fatorda
topPlaces.description: Fatorda is a suburb of the city of Margao in Salcete, Goa. Fatorda has been originally home to the traditional Scheduled Tribe/Scheduled Caste population.

topPlaces.name: Vidya Vikas Academy, Goa
topPlaces.description: Vidya Vikas Academy (VVA) is an English medium school co-educational in Goa. The school is affiliated to Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) .

items.note: The Ravindra Bhavan, Margao (RBM) is a cultural center situated in Fatorda, Goa, India. It is administered by the Directorate of Art and Culture, which is part of the Government of Goa.
The Gomant Vidya Niketan (GVN) is a private cultural center based in Comba, Goa, India. Established in 1912, it was originally founded as the Saraswat Brahman Samaj, a small library.

Comba (Komb) is a town and suburb of the city of Margao in South Goa district in the state of Goa, India close to the city of Margao. Comba is famous for Margao's well-known temple-hall "Dambaab Saal".It has Damodar Temple along with Ram temple.
Fatorda Stadium, officially known as Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium, is a multi-purpose stadium in Margao, Goa, India. The venue has been used to host both football and cricket matches.
Margao (Goan Konkani: Modgaum, IPA: [mɵɖɡãʋ]; Portuguese: Margão, IPA: [mɐɾɡɐ̃ũ]) is the commercial capital of the Indian state of Goa. It stands on the banks of the river Sal.

Gogol is a town and suburb of the city of Margao in South Goa district in the state of Goa, India. Gogol is a well connected suburb with good infrastructure such as schools, colleges, post office, banks, public transport, shopping areas close to Margao city.
Fatorda is a suburb of the city of Margao in Salcete, Goa. Fatorda has been originally home to the traditional Scheduled Tribe/Scheduled Caste population.
Vidya Vikas Academy (VVA) is an English medium school co-educational in Goa. The school is affiliated to Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) .

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Holy Spirit Church, Margao?
faq.a: The best time to visit Holy Spirit Church, Margao is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Holy Spirit Church, Margao?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (1 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Holy Spirit Church, Margao?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Holy Spirit Church, Margao at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Holy Spirit Church, Margao?
faq.a: Stays in Holy Spirit Church, Margao start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Holy Spirit Church, Margao?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ravindra Bhavan, Margao, Gomant Vidya Niketan, Comba, Goa, Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium (Margao), Margao.
